label: Town of Jova to Berkeley Mansion
summary: First guide product slice from the opening town eastward to the first mansion door.

notes: Pixels are rendered in the browser from ROM-derived CHR, layout, metatile, and palette bytes.
Actor sprites are rendered in the browser from ROM-derived CHR, decoded metasprite selector records, and packed runtime sprite palette bytes.
Presentation coordinates are authored for player readability and are not ROM world coordinates.
No PNG map textures are emitted for this app slice.

actorClasses.label: Jova shepherd
actorClasses.proof: ROM row id $B5 maps through live id $35 to animation record $0E, which emits selectors $24/$25.

actorClasses.label: Jova man
actorClasses.proof: ROM row id $AA maps through live id $2A to animation record $0D, which emits selectors $22/$23.

actorClasses.label: Jova clue NPC
actorClasses.proof: ROM row id $A8 maps through the town high-bit path to the same town-man animation record $0D.

actorClasses.label: White-crystal merchant
actorClasses.proof: ROM row id $AE maps through live id $2E to merchant animation record $0B, which emits selectors $1E/$1F.

actorClasses.label: Skeleton
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $03 uses selector-stream record $05, proven by live actor traces and decoded fixed-bank selector bytes.

actorClasses.label: Fishman
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $04 uses selector-stream record $06 for the body frames; the fishman proof supplies the segment sprite palettes.

actorClasses.label: Werewolf
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $13 uses selector-stream record $1E, proven by live Jova Woods actor traces.

actorClasses.label: Zombie
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $17 is loaded by the town night actor gate and uses selector-stream record $37.

actors.label: Jova shepherd
actors.text: first thing to do in this town is buy a white crystal.

actors.label: Jova shepherd
actors.text: you have a friend in the town of aldra. go and see him.

actors.label: Jova sign
actors.text: turn right for the jova woods. left for belasco marsh.

actors.label: Jova shepherd
actors.text: a magic potion will destroy the wall of evil.

actors.label: Jova man
actors.text: rumor has it, the ferryman at dead river loves garlic.

actors.label: Jova shepherd
actors.text: a crooked trader is offering bum deals in this town.

actors.label: Jova man
actors.text: a flame is on top of the 6th tree in denis woods.

actors.label: Jova clue NPC
actors.text: clues to dracula's riddle are in the town of veros.
